records.question: Who are the players that are no taller than 167.64 cm, have at most 38 aggression, short passing no more than 76, free kick accuracy at most 66, ball control no higher than 81, but at least 62 long passing and at least 43 marking?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT player.id FROM player
JOIN player_attributes ON player.player_api_id = player_attributes.player_api_id AND player.player_fifa_api_id = player_attributes.player_fifa_api_id
WHERE player_attributes.aggression <= 38.0 AND player_attributes.short_passing <= 76.0 AND player_attributes.long_passing >= 62.0 AND player_attributes.free_kick_accuracy <= 66.0 AND player.height <= 167.64 AND player_attributes.marking >= 43.0 AND player_attributes.ball_control <= 81.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT player.id 
FROM Player player 
JOIN Player_Attributes player_attributes 
ON player.player_api_id = player_attributes.player_api_id 
AND player.player_fifa_api_id = player_attributes.player_fifa_api_id 
WHERE player.height <= 167.64 
AND player_attributes.aggression <= 38.0 
AND player_attributes.short_passing <= 76.0 
AND player_attributes.long_passing >= 62.0 
AND player_attributes.free_kick_accuracy <= 66.0 
AND player_attributes.marking >= 43.0 
AND player_attributes.ball_control <= 81.0

records.question: Which players have exactly 70.0 agility, are right-footed, have exactly 5.0 gk_diving, at least 24.0 marking, exactly 64.0 vision, and their attributes dated on or before 2012-08-31?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT player.id FROM player
JOIN player_attributes ON player.player_api_id = player_attributes.player_api_id AND player.player_fifa_api_id = player_attributes.player_fifa_api_id
WHERE player_attributes.agility = 70.0 AND player_attributes.preferred_foot = 'right' AND player_attributes.gk_diving = 5.0 AND player_attributes.marking >= 24.0 AND player_attributes.date <= '2012-08-31 00:00:00' AND player_attributes.vision = 64.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT player.id 
FROM Player player 
JOIN Player_Attributes player_attributes 
ON player.player_api_id = player_attributes.player_api_id 
AND player.player_fifa_api_id = player_attributes.player_fifa_api_id 
WHERE player_attributes.agility = 70 
AND player_attributes.preferred_foot = 'right' 
AND player_attributes.gk_diving = 5 
AND player_attributes.marking >= 24 
AND player_attributes.date <= '2012-08-31 00:00:00' 
AND player_attributes.vision = 64
